name: Butter Pecan Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute pecans in butter, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes or until toasted. Set aside to cool.
2. Combine remaining ingredients; mix well. Pour mixture into freezer can of a 1-1/2 to 2-gallon hand-turned or electric freezer.
3. Freeze for about 10 minutes or until ice cream is thick.
4. Remove dasher, and add pecans to the ice cream mixture. Return dasher; freeze until firm according to manufacturer's instructions.
5. Let ripen at least 1 hour.
